title: thlaspi strictum
intro: Thlaspi strictum, also known as strict yellow rocket, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant contains compounds that have been found to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Thlaspi strictum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used to treat skin irritations and minor infections.
